headline: 继续使用 ALERT: 电动 2MeV 综合流量超过 1000pfu
impacts_text: 卫星系统可能遇到大量充电,从而增加卫星系统的风险.
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: ALTEF3
Serial Number: 3669
Issue Time: 2026 Apr 08 0459 UTC

CONTINUED ALERT: Electron 2MeV Integral Flux exceeded 1000pfu
Continuation of Serial Number: 3668
Begin Time: 2026 Apr 03 0920 UTC
Yesterday Maximum 2MeV Flux: 7359 pfu



Potential Impacts: Satellite systems may experience significant charging resulting in increased risk to satellite systems.

headline: G1类地磁暴
impacts_text: 撞击区域主要为地磁纬度60度的斜坡。 诱导电流——弱电网波动可能发生. 航天器 -- -- 对卫星操作的轻微影响可能。 奥罗拉-奥罗拉可能在高纬度地区可见,即美国北层如密歇根州北部和缅因州北部.
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: WATA20
Serial Number: 1107
Issue Time: 2026 Apr 08 0229 UTC

WATCH: Geomagnetic Storm Category G1 Predicted

Highest Storm Level Predicted by Day:
Apr 09:  None (Below G1)   Apr 10:  G1 (Minor)   Apr 11:  G1 (Minor)

THIS SUPERSEDES ANY/ALL PRIOR WATCHES IN EFFECT

NOAA Space Weather Scale descriptions can be found at
www.swpc.noaa.gov/noaa-scales-explanation

Potential Impacts: Area of impact primarily poleward of 60 degrees Geomagnetic Latitude.
Induced Currents - Weak power grid fluctuations can occur.
Spacecraft - Minor impact on satellite operations possible.
Aurora - Aurora may be visible at high latitudes, i.e., northern tier of the U.S. such as northern Michigan and Maine.

details.apr_09: None (Below G1)   Apr 10:  G1 (Minor)   Apr 11:  G1 (Minor)

headline: 摘要:X光事件超过M5
impacts_text: 撞击区域主要集中在地球日光一侧的次太阳点上. 无线电-高频(高频)无线电通信有限停电数十分钟.
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: SUMXM5
Serial Number: 312
Issue Time: 2026 Apr 04 0146 UTC

SUMMARY: X-ray Event exceeded M5
Begin Time: 2026 Apr 04 0107 UTC
Maximum Time: 2026 Apr 04 0117 UTC
End Time: 2026 Apr 04 0123 UTC
X-ray Class: M7.5
Location: N04W04
NOAA Scale: R2 - Moderate

NOAA Space Weather Scale descriptions can be found at
www.swpc.noaa.gov/noaa-scales-explanation

Potential Impacts: Area of impact centered primarily on sub-solar point on the sunlit side of Earth.
Radio - Limited blackout of HF (high frequency) radio communication for tens of minutes.

headline: ALERT: X射线流超过M5
impacts_text: 撞击区域以地球日光一侧的亚太阳点为中心. 高频(高频)无线电通信的断电程度取决于目前的X射线流强度. 关于受影响地区和预计持续时间的实时信息,请见http://www.swpc.noaa.gov/products/d-region-abcopy-progres-d-rap.
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: ALTXMF
Serial Number: 522
Issue Time: 2026 Apr 04 0117 UTC

ALERT: X-Ray Flux exceeded M5
Threshold Reached: 2026 Apr 04 0117 UTC
NOAA Scale: R2 - Moderate

NOAA Space Weather Scale descriptions can be found at
www.swpc.noaa.gov/noaa-scales-explanation

Potential Impacts: Area of impact centered on sub-solar point on the sunlit side of Earth. Extent of blackout of HF (high frequency) radio communication dependent upon current X-ray Flux intensity. For real-time information on affected area and expected duration please see http://www.swpc.noaa.gov/products/d-region-absorption-predictions-d-rap.

headline: ALERT:地磁K指数为6
impacts_text: 撞击区域主要为地磁纬度55度。 诱导电流——电网波动可能发生. 高纬度动力系统可能遇到电压警报. 航天器 -- -- 卫星定向可能出现不合规定之处;对低地球轨道卫星的拖曳可能增加。 无线电 -- -- 高频(高频)无线电传播可在较高纬度地区逐渐消失。 奥罗拉 - 奥罗拉可能被视为低级,如纽约到威斯康辛州到华盛顿州.
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: ALTK06
Serial Number: 712
Issue Time: 2026 Apr 03 2310 UTC

ALERT: Geomagnetic K-index of 6
 Threshold Reached: 2026 Apr 03 2303 UTC
Synoptic Period: 2100-2400 UTC
 
Active Warning: Yes
NOAA Scale: G2 - Moderate

NOAA Space Weather Scale descriptions can be found at
www.swpc.noaa.gov/noaa-scales-explanation

Potential Impacts: Area of impact primarily poleward of 55 degrees Geomagnetic Latitude.
Induced Currents - Power grid fluctuations can occur. High-latitude power systems may experience voltage alarms.
Spacecraft - Satellite orientation irregularities may occur; increased drag on low Earth-orbit satellites is possible.
Radio - HF (high frequency) radio propagation can fade at higher latitudes.
Aurora - Aurora may be seen as low as New York to Wisconsin to Washington state.

headline: ALERT:地磁K指数为7
impacts_text: 撞击区域主要为地磁纬度50度。 诱导电流 - 电源系统电压异常的可能,在一些保护装置上可能会触发假警报. 航天器 -- -- 系统可能遭遇地表充电;低地球轨道卫星的拖力增加,并可能出现定向问题。 导航 -- -- 可能发生间歇卫星导航(GPS)问题,包括失锁和射程误差增加。 无线电-高频(高频)无线电可能是间歇性的. 奥罗拉-奥罗拉可能被视为宾夕法尼亚州至爱荷华州至俄勒冈州低.
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: ALTK07
Serial Number: 216
Issue Time: 2026 Apr 03 1647 UTC

ALERT: Geomagnetic K-index of 7
 Threshold Reached: 2026 Apr 03 1646 UTC
Synoptic Period: 1500-1800 UTC
 
Active Warning: Yes
NOAA Scale: G3 - Strong

NOAA Space Weather Scale descriptions can be found at
www.swpc.noaa.gov/noaa-scales-explanation

Potential Impacts: Area of impact primarily poleward of 50 degrees Geomagnetic Latitude.
Induced Currents - Power system voltage irregularities possible, false alarms may be triggered on some protection devices.
Spacecraft - Systems may experience surface charging; increased drag on low Earth-orbit satellites and orientation problems may occur.
Navigation - Intermittent satellite navigation (GPS) problems, including loss-of-lock and increased range error may occur.
Radio - HF (high frequency) radio may be intermittent.
Aurora - Aurora may be seen as low as Pennsylvania to Iowa to Oregon.

headline: ALERT:地磁K指数为5
impacts_text: 撞击区域主要为地磁纬度60度的斜坡。 诱导电流——弱电网波动可能发生. 航天器 -- -- 对卫星操作的轻微影响可能。 奥罗拉-奥罗拉可能在高纬度地区可见,即美国北层如密歇根州北部和缅因州北部.
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: ALTK05
Serial Number: 2003
Issue Time: 2026 Apr 03 1542 UTC

ALERT: Geomagnetic K-index of 5
 Threshold Reached: 2026 Apr 03 1535 UTC
Synoptic Period: 1500-1800 UTC
 
Active Warning: Yes
NOAA Scale: G1 - Minor

NOAA Space Weather Scale descriptions can be found at
www.swpc.noaa.gov/noaa-scales-explanation

Potential Impacts: Area of impact primarily poleward of 60 degrees Geomagnetic Latitude.
Induced Currents - Weak power grid fluctuations can occur.
Spacecraft - Minor impact on satellite operations possible.
Aurora - Aurora may be visible at high latitudes, i.e., northern tier of the U.S. such as northern Michigan and Maine.

headline: ALERT: Electron 2MeV 综合流量超过1000pfu
impacts_text: 卫星系统可能遇到大量充电,从而增加卫星系统的风险.
message_raw:
Space Weather Message Code: ALTEF3
Serial Number: 3664
Issue Time: 2026 Apr 03 0936 UTC

ALERT: Electron 2MeV Integral Flux exceeded 1000pfu
Threshold Reached: 2026 Apr 03 0920 UTC
Station: GOES19
 



Potential Impacts: Satellite systems may experience significant charging resulting in increased risk to satellite systems.
